title: Resolution of Stressed Assets Directions, 2025 - Amendment on Specified Non-Financial Assets (SNFAs)
source_url: https://www.rbi.org.in (Official RBI website - specific circular URL not directly accessible from search results)
description: RBI issued final prudential norms prohibiting banks, small finance banks (SFBs), and NBFCs from selling specified non-financial assets (SNFAs) acquired during the resolution of stressed loans back to defaulting borrowers or related parties. Lenders must follow SARFAESI principles for public auctions and dispose of assets within seven years. Legacy SNFAs must comply by September 30, 2027.
